sentiment.reasoning: A 7% drop in new customer orders indicates reduced demand, negatively impacting future revenue and growth prospects.

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns will incur costs, damage reputation, and potentially reduce future sales.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
